paper_meta.Paper_title: Biotech   Bioengineering - 2020 - Menacho‐Melgar - Improved two‐stage protein expression and purification via autoinduction

protocols.Paper_title: Improved two-stage protein expression and purification via autoinduction of both autolysis and auto DNA/RNA hydrolysis conferred by phage lysozyme and DNA/RNA endonuclease
protocols.Evidence: cells were harvested by centrifugation...resuspended in lysis buffer...0.1% Triton X-100...single freeze thaw...incubated at 37C

protocols.Paper_title: Improved two-stage protein expression and purification via autoinduction of both autolysis and auto DNA/RNA hydrolysis conferred by phage lysozyme and DNA/RNA endonuclease
protocols.Evidence: Supernatant removed using plate washer/filler; lysis buffer added...placed at -60C for 30 min...lysates clarified by centrifugation

protocols.Paper_title: Improved two-stage protein expression and purification via autoinduction of both autolysis and auto DNA/RNA hydrolysis conferred by phage lysozyme and DNA/RNA endonuclease
protocols.Evidence: The low concentration of mild detergents (0.1% Triton X-100) used are also compatible with high-throughput... capillary electrophoresis systems
